TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Draki, title = Draki, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Draki} }

S.FORM: alang Draki ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 250 buwan, 618 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 594 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Bunun 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Draki hya' ga Kus kus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Draki ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 250 buwan, 618 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 594 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Bunun 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Draki hya' ga Kus kus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *raki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βotan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *raki ħjaʔ ɣa kus~ɕ kus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
